map_coverage: Tun thlenga khawpui {total} thlirlet zinga {done} - a bak zawng chu nitin an belh zel a ni.
cur_so_far: {year} tun thlenga ({day} {month} thleng): {v} °C a vaiin, {d} °C vs 1961-1990 mean kum khat chhunga ni inang.
cmp_hint: Curve tin hi chu khawpui kum tin anomaly vs a mah 1961-1990 baseline a ni a, chuvangin climate hrang hrang awmna hmunte chu a fair takin an khaikhin a ni.
kpi_since: Kum 1940 atang khan khawvel lum chhoh zel
sum_season: Hetah hian khaw lum chak ber: {season} (kum sawm khatah {v} °C).
sum_month: Hetah hian thla lum chak ber: {month} (kum sawm khatah {v} °C).
grid_alias_note: Temperature record hi ~11 km climate-data grid cell khatah chhut a ni. {alias} hian a cell chu {city} nen a insem a, chuvangin an pahnih hian 1940-tuna history inang an lantir a ni.
qv_nodata: He khawpui tan hian data a la awm lo.
guide_title: ℹ️ Heng chart te hi chhiar dan tur
guide_body:
• Dots / bars: kum khat chhunga value.
  • Bold colored curve: a LOESS smoother: local trend, free to bend, chuvangin hun kal zelah rate inthlak danglamna i hmu thei ang (e.g. warming accelerating after ~1985).
  • Dashed line: a dinglam robust (Theil-Sen) trend; a slope chu legend-a “per decade” figure a ni.
  • p<0.05 / n.s.: Mann-Kendall significance: trend chu statistically real a nih leh nih loh emaw, noise chauh a ni thei em tih emaw (n.s. = not significant). Temperature hi a langsar hle tlangpui a; ruahtui tla fo hi a ni lo.
  • Shaded band: chu thla chhunga kum zawng zawnga historical range kimchang.
  • Heatmap colours: temperature (blue cold → red warm); kum tam tak chhunga chu thla a inthlak danglam dan en turin a hnuai lam atanga chunglam thlenga column chhiar rawh.
threshold_title: Kum khatah ni lum & vawt tak, {name}
yearly_title: Kum khat chhunga kum khat chhunga boruak lum leh vawt zat, {name}.
yearly_ylabel: Kum khat chhunga boruak lum leh vawt (°C).
vs_full: vs. hun pumhlum chhunga mean ({base:.1f} °C) te nen.
heatmap_title: Thla tin kum khata khaw lum zat, {name}.
anom_heatmap_title: Thla tin anomaly vs. {base}, {name} te a ni.
dashboard_suptitle: {name} temperature {start}-{end} (a chhuahna: Open-Meteo reanalysis) a ni.
subtitle: {start}-{end} · {days} ni · a lum ber {wy} ({wv:.1f} °C), a vawt ber {cy} ({cv:.1f} °C)
analog_line: Kum 2050-ah chuan tualchhung boruak chu tunlai {analog} ang deuhin a awm thei a, +{d} °C velin a lum zawk ang.
analog_past: Kum 1940 khan tualchhung boruak chu tunlai {analog} ang deuhin a lang a, {d} °C velin a lum zawk.
cap_yearly: Kum tin mean chu LOESS smoother (acceleration a lantir) leh Theil-Sen trend +significance nghet tak nei
cap_anomalies: Kum tin 1961-1990 average nena khaikhin chuan: red bars warmer, blue cooler. Blue tam zawk atanga red tam zawka inthlak hi a lumna a ni.
cap_heatmap: Kum tin thla tin average chu color grid (2 °C bands) angin. Chu thla chu kum sawm tam tak chhunga a lum lai en turin column pakhat chu chunglam hawiin chhiar rawh.
cap_anom_heatmap: Grid inang, mahse thla tin hi a 1961-1990 normal nen tehkhin a ni a, chuvangin a inthlak danglamna chauh hian a lantir (a tlangpui aia sen lum zawk, blue cooler), seasonal cycle chu paih chhuah a ni.
cap_threshold: Kum tin ni 18 °C aia sang (hot) leh 0 °C hnuai lam (freezing). Trend robust pahnih crossing hian tunah chuan hot day a tam zawk tihna a ni.
hint: Khawi hmunah pawh click la, Esc hmet la, khar rawh
intro: Kum 1940 atanga khawvel khawpui lian ber berte an lum dan: ERA5 climate reanalysis atanga nitin temperature record.
map_heading: Khawvel hmun hrang hranga boruak lum leh vawt
map_sub: Map-ah emaw, list aṭangin emaw khawpui pakhat thlang rawh
map_filter: Continent emaw ram emaw entir rawh
omni_ph: Khawpui, ram, bial emaw hmun eng pawh zawng rawh
omni_places: Khawvel hmun hrang hranga hmun hrang hrang
range_title: Kum hrang hranga thla tin boruak lum dan, {name}.
cap_range: Thla tin min-max range kum tam tak chhunga, kum hnuhnung ber nen. Warm edge chu a kuah em ni?
record_band: record awm zat chu {start}-{end} a ni.
cap_records: Thla tin nitin record sang ber leh hniam ber a ni a, kum hnuhnung berah chuan extreme a awm bawk
volatility_title: Kum khatah nitin khaw lum a inthlak danglam a, {name}.
volatility_ylabel: Ni tam tak chu jump lian tak nen
cap_volatility: Kum tin nitin temperature jump lian tak tak engzat nge (≥6 °C), temperature variability
cap_precip: Kum khata ruahtui tla zawng zawng (ruah leh vur tui) chu trend nen
cap_stripes: Stripe tin hi kum khat chhunga temperature a ni: blue cooler, red warmer 1961-1990 average aiin. Blue atanga red a drift chu a lumna a ni a, colour tih loh chu chhiar tur a awm lo.
cap_season: Kum tin thermal growth season rei zawng (run of days with a daily mean ≥ 5 °C): frost-free window farming hi a innghat a, boruak lum chhoh zel chuan a sei zel.
cap_dtr: Nitin a sang leh hniam inkar average gap. A shrinking range chu greenhouse fingerprint a ni: ni aiin zan a lum chak zawk; a widening pakhat chuan drying a signal thei.
cap_seasonshift: A hmasa ber vs. kum sawm hnuhnung ber record-a kum average. Thla tin curve inkar gap hian kum khat chhunga eng hmun nge lum ber tih a tarlang a (a tam zawkah chuan thlasik laiin thlasik aiin a lum zawk thin).
health_heading: Hriselna lama nghawng a neih dan tur chhinchhiahna
health_sub: A chunga warming trends te hi heat-, cold- leh extreme-event exposure metrics hriat lar takah a chantir dan. Chart tin hi a mamawh data awmna hmunah a lang vek a.
cap_degreedays: Kum tin thermal-comfort burden: heating mamawh (18 °C hnuai lam) a tlahniam laiin cooling mamawh (22 °C aia sang) a sang a, hei hi cold exposure leh air-conditioning mamawhna proxy a ni.
cap_heatwave: Heat wave-a ni: ni ≥3 run a ni a, ni khata a sang ber chu local 1961-1990 90th percentile aia sang a ni. Nitin khaw lum chhunzawm zel hi heat-wave excess mortality thlentu ber a ni.
cap_tropic: Zan lama low chu 20 °C emaw a aia sang emaw a awm laiin, chuvangin taksain zan khat chhunga hahdamna a hmu lo a, hei hi khaw lum vanga thihna thlentu hmahruaitu, ngaihthah fo thin a ni.
cap_coldspell: Ni tam tak, khaw lum lai: ni ≥3 chhung tlan a ni a, nitin a hniam ber chu local 1961-1990 10th percentile hnuai lam a ni. Hun rei tak khawsik hian thlasik laiin cardiovascular leh respiratory excess thihna a thlen thin.
cap_heavyrain: Ni 20 mm tal ruah sur (ETCCDI R20mm), tuilian thlen thei ruahtui tlak lohna, hliam, hmun danga insawn leh tui atanga natna thlen thei.
heatindex_title: Kum khatah heat-index ni hlauhawm tak, {name}.
cap_heatindex: Ni tam takah chuan temperature langsar (heat index, humidity-a fold) chu heat-stress level a thleng a, chu chu metric public heat advisory-te chuan an hmang a ni. Apparent-temperature dataset a mamawh a ni.
footer: Generated {date} · data from Open-Meteo historical reanalysis (ERA5) · source on GitHub
qv_baseline: Kum sawm chhunga averages vs 1961-1990 baseline
qv_chart_alt: Kum sawm hnu kum sawm chhunga lum chhoh zel, area chart khata khat
